mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE member_email = #{memberEmail} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (member_id, member_email, member_pass, member_name, member_phone, member_address, member_gender, member_birth, member_role, member_status, balance) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPass}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberGender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberBirth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{memberRole}, #{memberStatus}, #{balance})
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE MEMBER SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE MEMBER SET member_status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
